review_title: Sync Cloud Storage - Canadian Local Favorite
description: Overall it has been great! Affordable, quick and perfect for what I needed it for.
author: Holly P.
pros: Ease of use, integration into MS Windows and speed of upload/download time. And it's Canadian!
cons: Sometimes it's difficult to edit the share settings. I have a hard time deciphering between the team sharing and the send a link sharing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A perfectly suited solution for us.
description: We are very pleased to count Sync as a trusted partner providing us with the cloud storage services our company requires. The encryption, real time backup and ownership of our data are the features that caught our attention. Compliance with the rather demanding requirements of our local (Swiss) regulators is also easily met.
author: Nicholas M.
pros: Data encryption, real time backup, ownership of our data.
cons: I cannot think of a feature we are missing or an issue me and the team have faced while using Sync.

review_title: The worst sync service out there
description: horrible. Spent weeks trying to resolve issues that were not resolved and have to move on to another company
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I wish i can leave 0 reviews. Absolutely not reliable service. Customer service that replies once a day with not relevant answers, no phone call option. For the last 8 months pretty much tried to resolve one issue after another and finally gave up. The interesting part - there is no prorated refund.
cons: initially a few years ago it was a decent service, now i do not know what is good about it, may be plenty of manuals on their site

description: Very positive, versioning is also a great safety feature.
author: Herbert T.
pros: End to end encryption, I’m currently travelling in Japan and current hotel Wifi does not work well with my VPN but with Sync end to end encryption I feel very comfortable continuing to use my files without VPN on an open wifi connection.
cons: Nothing major I can think of, upload speed can be faster but it’s probably on my end.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Sync is useful in many ways.
author: Ian M.
pros: I can use Sync in all formats. It’s very convenient when I’m traveling with my iPad and iPhone. My files update very quickly which is impressive.
cons: Can’t think of any. I don’t have any complaints

review_title: your data here is not safe
description: zero customer service. does not keep your data safe. disappearing data and zero response from company
author: Jamie N.
pros: seemed like perfect solution. It is not.
cons: I uploaded all of my work integral to my business to SYNC. I thought it was the perfect save as my computer was getting completely glitchy and insisted on upgrading to windows 11. I got all of my data onto SYNC and I thought it would be the perfect solution for my business. Within days of uploading file folder content began disappearing. Repeated pleas to the company have not helped in any way. Demanded at least full refund and still no response over 48 hours later. DO NOT USE this company unless you want to risk losing everything.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Sync gives me fast, easy, and private access to my files whenever I want and wherever I am: at home, at work, or on-the-go. I've been using Sync for 2 years and don't ever remember having a problem. I've never lost a file or had a file get corrupted. Their service has been great! I would highly recommend giving them a try. They offer a free tier with paid options available if you need more features.
author: Kevin K.
pros: There are many file repository services available in the Cloud these days, but few have end-to-end encryption like Sync. That was the main reason I transferred all my personal files from Dropbox to Sync: to maintain maximum privacy. I'm the only one who holds the keys to my data.
cons: The web interface works fine on a monitor, but is somewhat hard to use on a mobile device. Sync has a mobile app that works well on modern devices, but there have been times when I've needed to access my Sync files on a mobile device that was too old to run the app.

review_title: Like having an external backup with sharing capabilities in one
author: Charles A.
pros: I love the way it's so easy to share any link and that I can easily remove someone's permission. Also, my colleague is having problems with her computer so Sync is really stopping her from losing some of those files and also it means I can access them on my computer or she can on another computer.
cons: I have no complaints. Although sometimes the only way I can access my colleagues' files in the shared folder on the desktop is by logging in on the online version or even her version. So if it was instantly there without, it would be better, but the fact I can still easily access and download the files makes it not much of a problem.

description: I found SyncWith by accident when my Zapier 'zaps' weren't cutting the mustard any longer. MAN did I bark up the right tree!!! Not only was it quick to setup, easy to navigate, and fairly self-intuitive, but when it wasn't, their support staff was!!! NO LIE... must've been over 100 emails back and forth. Oh, and 99.999% of the issues I was emailing them about turned out to be... wait for it... 100% operator error!Thanks [SENSITIVE CONTENT]! The app, once set up properly BY THE USER (lol), worked perfectly! In fact, we were able to pinpoint some bad data coming from the data source! SyncWith connected easily to the API address, and brought the data back perfectly! You can even rename the [fields] before running the sync. I also had to use "X-Api-Secret", "X-Api-Partner-Id" and a "tennant.id". And even though I knew not what they were, [SENSITIVE CONTENT] got them set up in minutes!
author: David G.
pros: * It worked perfectly! * The support for when I got stuck was EXCELLENT! * It offers lots of options (adding or removing fields from your sync)! * I was able to use 'X-Api-Secret', 'X-Api-Partner-Id', and even a "tenant.id" easily!
cons: * Nothing that I could find! Seriously! Every time I got stuck (and by 'stuck' really I mean 'not slowing down and taking the time to figure simple things out!'), they were at the other end of that email... almost instantly, to walk me through what I had missed. And most of all, they were patient and kind in their responses... which there were A LOT of! lol (thx [SENSITIVE CONTENT]!)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Gabor C.
pros: mobile app can stream videos and 2024 black friday promo was awesome
cons: especially I can not say anything bad about the service

description: Very positive. Signed up with Sync.com many years ago following many reports that they should be considered amongst the best providers when it comes to privacy. Tried out their free trial tier and was happy to find that the service performed very well as a file storage solution. Never had any complaints with performance and the team have been responsive when I’ve reached out to them. Highly recommended as a service.
author: Richard C.
pros: The focus on privacy was a key motivator for trying the service out, and I was happy to find the performance also matched. The service performs its functions admirably.
cons: The apps functional but I’d like the ability to customise the colours and icons a bit. Minor quibbles but.

description: Sync is the only backup service that we actually had to "use". There was a tragic and unexpected event and we lost everything, I mean all of it. After this I logged into sync hoping the important things I had uploaded were still there. They were still there just as I had left them, and things from multiple computers that I had forgotten to backup were on there as well. We actually wound up losing very little thanks to Sync.com. If I had still been using another service I don't think there would have been such a happy ending.
author: Rhonda P.
pros: Sync.com is a safe place to keep any type of records and files, even protected health information. Sync is HIPAA compliant and protects your information very well. No settings have to be changed or enabled, the protection is already set up. The first 5GB is free, different plans to choose from for different needs and budgets.
cons: Sync is great but it's not the same as an EMR or cloud storage specialized for medical records. It would be great if Sync launched something like this, I think many organizations would use it including mine. Sync would be better if the customer service teams didn't have such long wait times.

review_title: After 1 year using Pro version of Dropbox and Sync, I now only use Sync.com
author: Brahm D.
pros: Fast. Affordable. Secure. Intuitive. For half the price of Dropbox, plus the ability to recover old versions and deleted files. For business, teams are basically free, compare to Dropbox where an account with teams isan amount per user, sync is a small amount per user. Sync also has a vault feature, which is a nice for backup files and long term storage of files that you want to keep safe and don't need to work with everyday. Love that when you share folders with someone, the shared folders only count toward the original users quota. This makes it possible for a PRO user to share large files with free account users. With Dropbox, I couldn't share large folders with clients unless they had a paid Dropbox account.
cons: If you try to change too many file or folder names in too short a time, Sync starts to produce conflicting files, especially if you have two computers syncing to the cloud at the same time. Dropbox algorithms seem to resolve file conflicts better. There is not much customer support to speak of, just help boards and email.

review_title: No No No! This is the most terrible experience I made with clouds
description: No benefits, only problems and data lost.
author: Marina Z.
pros: Nothing positive, only negative experience
cons: I am a private user with 500 GB storage paid for 1 year. 1. The desktop app (version 2.XX, the latest sync.com offeres) is NOT WORKING. Neither under Windows 7, nor under Windows 10 Enterprise. Even after many installations and deinstallations it just keeps indexing, freezing, not synchonising and uploading the data. Instead, it looses the files while the so-called "synchronisation process". 2. The data upload via the browser panel is just pure pain. Watching the upload progress from Europe to the sync.com servers in Canada makes me cry bloody tears: it is just so terribly slow, slooooooow. The browser panel is also not able to reconnect to the cloud once the Internet connection is lost. I do not even mention that while uploading a list of files, some files are not uploaded and I mostly have to restart the WHOLE process. After using the service only for a few days, I am already thinking to ask for the refund. Sync.com is definitely NOT an alternative for Box, Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, etc. It is just pain in the ...s.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Orlando L.
pros: It's a cloud service that is well-priced and with many great security features for sharing files.
cons: It still needs to have some features that other famous cloud providers have, like unlimited file batch upload from a smartphone.

description: I write books. Whenever I close down my writing software it updates the cloud storage automatically to cloud storage.
author: STEVE T.
pros: It simply sits quietly in the background and gets on with its job. It's free!
cons: Nothing. It does everything that it claims it can do

author: Douglas W.
pros: Canada based - thus keeping sensitive files in Canada. Encrypted, more secure than some competitors. Easily share files or directories even with non-users. Accessible in browser or app. Maintains a log of activity. 5GB free to start but simple ways to get that increased.
cons: Not as much free space as Google Drive. Easy to overlook compared to Google, Dropbox, etc. Haven't really encountered any issue yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Raúl M.
pros: The fastest way to upload all type of files without waits, the security of th system
cons: Din't have a preview of multiple tipes of files.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Amanda C.
pros: Easy to use and secure! Meets my needs! I trialed at least 3 cloud services and this one was the one that I went with!
cons: No complaints, I have enjoyed using this software. The only thing I would change is instead of having to download a file to view that it just pop up in a view window once uploaded.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Not good for Adobe Creative Suite users who share files
description: When things were running good (the early days, several years ago) we were very please and would recommend it to anyone. The last few years we've tried to get suppport because of the Adobe Creative Suite issue (not yet diagnosed as to why we were having problems), and Sync support was not helpful when I could get any support. We will be leaving Sync when I can find anoterh source.
author: Darryl A.
pros: Sync is easy to use and keeps our files synced among three designers. When I update a file on my machine, Sync updates on the other two designers' machines. (But ... which comes in the least like field)
cons: When we first started using Sync several years ago it was GREAT! BUT changes in Adobe Creative Suite (according to Sync support) made it so that our files would not keep links to images and files, making sharing our files very cumbersome, to the point we are leaving Sync once we find an alternative. Getting support is not easy. If your problem is a canned issue, their knowledge base is good, but if your problem is different, getting support is not easy.

description: It is really good indeed with good support.
author: Navharsh K.
pros: It works really well at sharing files and storing stuff.
cons: Need better in built features like other apps.

review_title: Good storage option in low budget
author: anjum T.
pros: interface is good and storage options are economical
cons: Integrations are not that easy and should be improved
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: This service easily solved my primary problem, where I needed to have files accessible across multiple devices, but not stored on those devices. Sync.com stores the files only in the cloud. In a nutshell, here's what I like: Easy-to-use interface. Excellent security. Great customer service. Great for privacy conscious people. Files are not lost if a device breaks.
author: Roger W.
pros: One feature that's particularly useful is privacy. As your files are encrypted, they don't have the encryption key - A super feature in the event you want to keep your files available on other devices, but only available to you. Additionally, it's awesome to start working on a document (for example) stored on sync.com, then later to use another device and keep working on the same document. This makes life much easier! Also (I've run into this a few times), their clouded store save me a lot of work. Why? If my computer dies, I don't lose any of my important files, and can even access them using a mobile device, or another computer.
cons: The only significant downside I've run into, is that they don't have a Linux based application (they support Windows and Mac). You can still use a web browser to access sync.com on Linux, but it's not quite the same as a native application. Having said that, it's still a great solution.

review_title: Advanced features with high level security!
description: We realized the benefits of secure and reliable cloud storage with sync. We have really made progress and improved our reputation by using their wonderful file sharing feature. We have improved our efficiency and organization along with our ability to work together and collaborate.
author: Kira D.
pros: So many pros! Sync is very professional and polished. Sync is secure and uses strong end to end encryption, not the reduced levels like other software (Google for example). I truly feel safe. Sync stores your data on their servers and they do not allow anyone else to access them. They also can not view your files. 10/10 on security. The file sharing is excellent and has advanced features not offered by other products! Sync also has the capability and capacity to meet the needs of specialized businesses. The pros certainly outweigh the cons.
cons: The only cons are price, and that at first it can be difficult to navigate. There are a lot of options and advanced features but that means it takes a while to learn how to use everything for some people.

description: My overall experience with Sync.com has been excellent. I have relied on it for many years now, primarily as a means to back up my important documents, but also as a convenience to access documents from wherever I may be in an emergency. I am surprised by the low price (I think it has been $49/year for several years now), so it is a great service for the cost.
author: Lynn B.
pros: Sync.com was very easy to implement and it runs almost flawlessly. I have had very little problems in the several years that I have relied on Sync.com for my cloud/back-up storage. Also, I can access my documents very easily from anywhere, including my phone. It is great and the price was about half that of dropbox.
cons: A couple of times I found that the back-up was not functioning. This may have been a result in a glitch in my computer that was interfering with the back-up, but when it did happen a couple of times, it caused quite a panic because I didn't know for how long things were not being backed-up. I also found it a little difficult to authorize someone else to have access to my documents, although I was able to figure it out after a while.
